top_signals.title: Wall Street Talks Up Carry Trade as Returns Soar Most in Decades
top_signals.summary: One of the most enduring foreign-exchange bets is off to its best run in decades as surprisingly muted volatility across asset classes has investors piling into carry trades.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Economic Momentum Flips From Blessing to Curse for S&P 500 Bulls
top_signals.summary: Strong economic momentum is a double-edged sword for US equity traders. Solid growth is an earnings tailwind. But let it run too hot, and it turns from blessing to curse.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: More MiCA-licensed crypto firms could exit EU market: Gate Europe CEO
top_signals.summary: Gate Europe’s Giovanni Cunti says some MiCA-licensed crypto firms may struggle to sustain compliance costs as Europe enters its new regulatory era.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
